form.formComment: Has been racing extremely well, putting four wins together. Last start won easily by 4 lengths at this track (19.80) beating Runaway Merv in a Invitation on April 13. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 10 length fifth over 530m at this track. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight in a handy (16.87), beating Afire. Winner last time and looks well placed again. Worth following up.
